overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a rainy desert highway at night, featuring steady vehicle traffic, wind turbines in the distance, and concrete barriers lining the roadside. The footage is clearly from a video game engine with high-quality rain effects and wet road reflections.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night along a desert highway, with the camera walking steadily beside red-and-white concrete barriers. Wind turbines stand in the distant background while vehicles periodically pass by on the wet asphalt, their headlights cutting through the downpour.

segments.scene_description: As the walk continues, a digital billboard becomes visible on the left side of the highway while the concrete barrier recedes to the mid-distance. The roadside vegetation shifts to the right foreground, and various vehicles including a yellow SUV pass by in the steady rain.

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera walks past the digital billboard which is now prominent on the left, while the highway barrier has faded into the distance. The road continues toward a glowing city skyline in the far background, with sporadic traffic passing by in the persistent heavy rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a rain-slicked desert highway that gradually shifts from a desolate roadside to a view of a distant urban horizon. It begins beside red-and-white concrete barriers under a heavy downpour, with wind turbines standing in the far distance as vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt. As the camera moves forward, the concrete barriers recede into the mid-distance while a digital billboard emerges on the left and roadside vegetation shifts into the right foreground. The scene then opens further as the camera passes the prominent billboard, leaving the barriers behind entirely. Finally, the perspective extends down the highway toward a glowing city skyline in the far background, with sporadic traffic continuing to cut through the persistent rain.
